case_title: ASSET ACCEPTANCE LLC VS. CASSIE PENDLETON et al

docket_entries.description: MINI-MINUTES FOR SEP-15-2010 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 212
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR SEP-15-2010 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ASSET ACCEPTANCE LLC SERVED AUG-21-2010, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT PENDLETON, CASSIE

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ASSET ACCEPTANCE LLC AS TO DEFENDANT PENDLETON, CASSIE DOES 1 TO 5, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-26-2010
CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING SEP-15-2010 AT 1:30PM. THIS DISMISSAL IS PURSUANT TO PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
